name: Sepia Tears
short_description: A visual novel about a memory that a boy named Mark tries very hard to forget, and a girl named Myra who unearths it.
detailed_description:
Our next game is available now!



After several years of development, our upcoming game, Monospaced Lovers, is finally available for purchase!

The game is an exploration-driven platformer with a visual novel-esque storyline. You'll find a link to it in the Scarlet String Studios publisher page. Enjoy!


About the Game

"I'm the person you wish you never met."


Sepia Tears is a romance visual novel. It's about a memory that a boy named Mark tries very hard to forget, and a girl named Myra who unearths it.

Together, they search for a storybook romance and realize that love doesn't always bloom as neatly as it ought to.

Perfect for fans of anime and VNs who want a classic story with a twist!

Features:
❄️ Vocal ending song
❄️ 40,000 word story
❄️ CG gallery containing game CGs, chibi CGs, and promo art
